description.zh-Hans: 生成编织布料纹理，支持平纹、斜纹和缎纹编织图案。具有经线/纬线颜色、厚度控制、毛绒感、逐线颜色变化和表面细节等特性。
description.en: Generates woven fabric textures supporting plain, twill, and satin weave patterns. Features warp/weft thread colors, thickness control, fuzziness, per-thread color variation, and surface detail.

triggers.zh-Hans: 布料, 织物, 编织, 纺织, 平纹, 斜纹, 缎纹
triggers.en: fabric, cloth, textile, weave, twill, satin

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成编织布料纹理，用于角色服装、旗帜或家具材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a woven fabric texture for character clothing, banners, or furniture materials.
